debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
c : Circuit p (ZMod p)
h : rw_bisim c.eval (Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) c))
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
ew : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w
⊢ Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e.eval = Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args

failed_attempts:
sorry
      have h₂ : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
        sorry
      have h₃ : (cs).eval = cs.eval := by
        sorry
      have h₄ : (assert_bits_e args (cs)).eval = cs.eval := by
        sorry
      have h₅ : (bits2num_e args - e).eval = 0 := by
        sorry
      have h₆ : (Cs.eq0 (bits2num_e args - e) (cs)).eval = cs.eval := by
        sorry
      simp_all [assert_bit_e, assert_bits_e, bits2num_e, cs]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all) <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try aesop)
